message:
chore(deps): bump calamine 0.26.1 → 0.34.0

Large-jump bump (8 minor versions) of the Excel-reading crate used by
fp-io. Cargo.lock picked up a coordinated transitive refresh:
- quick-xml 0.31.0 → 0.39.2
- + atoi_simd 0.17.0, debug_unsafe 0.1.4, fast-float2 0.2.3
- Removed zip 2.4.2, arbitrary 1.4.2, derive_arbitrary 1.4.2,
  displaydoc 0.2.5 (calamine switched zip backend / dropped
  no-longer-needed transitives).

fp-io uses only the public `calamine::{Data, Reader,
open_workbook_auto, open_workbook_auto_from_rs}` surface. All of these
retained identical signatures across 0.26 → 0.34; the `Data` enum
variants (Int, Float, String, Bool, Empty, DateTime, DateTimeIso,
DurationIso, Error) are unchanged.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-io --lib` → 192 passed, 0 failed
  (includes every .xlsx round-trip + cell-value conversion test).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
